Issue: MONAI Deploy setup and execution issues on MacBook Pro 2019 (Intel CPU) due to lack of CUDA/NVIDIA driver support
Decision: Mac is not supported by MONAI Deploy toolkit as it requires NVIDIA driver
Rationale: The toolkit requires NVIDIA driver and Ubuntu 22.04 with glibc 2.35 on X86-64, which are not met on MacBook Pro 2019 (Intel CPU)
Author: learnbanjo
Description: MONAI Deploy tutorial setup and execution on MacBook Pro 2019 (Intel CPU)
Risk: Lack of NVIDIA driver support on MacBook Pro 2019 (Intel CPU) prevents toolkit execution

Argument.author: learnbanjo
Argument.argument: Mac is not supported the toolkit requires requires NVIDIA driver

Justification: The ticket discusses environment setup and infrastructure requirements (CUDA/NVIDIA driver) explicitly noted as a prerequisite for the MONAI Deploy toolkit, which are deployment-related concerns.
